$comment: Authoritative pointer file linking the Balencia repo to its Figma files. Populated incrementally across phases. Commit after every phase so future sessions can resume without rediscovery.

balencia_ds.name: Balencia DS
balencia_ds.purpose: Design system library — tokens, components, foundations docs. Published to team library.

balencia_screens.name: Balencia Screens
balencia_screens.purpose: Consumer file — 97 iPhone screens composed of Balencia DS instances.

ds_pages.$comment: Filled in Phase 2 (2026-05-28). Maps page name -> node ID for resumable scripts.

ds_collections.$comment: Filled in Phase 1. variable collection name -> { id, modes: { modeName: modeId } }.

ds_variables.$comment: Filled in Phase 1 as each variable lands. Mapped from balencia-screens/scripts/figma-tokens-map.json. variable_path -> figma_variable_id.

ds_text_styles.$comment: Filled in Phase 1. style name -> style ID. Sora ramp; note: Sora maxes at ExtraBold (no 900/Black), so Display XL uses ExtraBold.
ds_text_styles.Caption: S:0b81e86cddb1fc1f328c5af51b4a1d60e6c63da2,

ds_effect_styles.$comment: Filled in Phase 1. style name -> style ID.

ds_components.$comment: Filled in Phase 2-3 as each component lands. component name -> { node_id, page_node_id, key }. Mirrors balencia-screens/scripts/figma-components-map.json.

PhoneFrame / Default Content.$comment: Default value of PhoneFrame's Content INSTANCE_SWAP property. Replace per-screen during Phase 4-5.

Button.$comment: Icon slots are 20x20 frames toggled by HasLeftIcon/HasRightIcon BOOLEAN props. Atom #18 retrofit (2026-05-28) replaced the placeholder RECTANGLEs with 20x20 instances of Icon/Plus (left default) and Icon/ArrowRight (right default), wired via LeftIcon (INSTANCE_SWAP, key LeftIcon#107:0) and RightIcon (INSTANCE_SWAP, key RightIcon#107:16) at the SET level. GOTCHA: addComponentProperty('Name','INSTANCE_SWAP', defaultValue) requires the LOCAL COMPONENT NODE ID as defaultValue, not the published key — passing plus.key threw 'Property value is incompatible with component property type', while plus.id succeeded. preferredValues option still uses { type: 'COMPONENT', key: <key> }. This applies to all retrofit atoms.

ButtonState.$comment: State-axis aux for Button. Documentation reference showing Default / Pressed (Glow/Orange) / Disabled (50% opacity) / Loading (spinner placeholder + 'Loading' label) on Primary Md. Engineering composes via Button — Disabled/Loading booleans land in a future iteration.

Chip.$comment: HasIcon promoted from variant axis to BOOLEAN (matches Button/Input). Active=True uses color/brand/cta for border + text in all 3 Variants; Filled+Active gets color/surface/glow-orange tint; Outline+Active uses 2px border. Neutral and Outline have transparent fill at rest. Atom #18 retrofit (2026-05-29): added Icon INSTANCE_SWAP (key Icon#111:0) with default Icon/Sparkles on all 6 variants. Sparkles is the AI-suggestion default (royal-purple semantic in code); designers swap to domain-relevant icons per instance. Slot is 16×16 (smaller than Button's 20×20).

SegmentedControl.$comment: 9 variants (invalid Count×Index combos skipped). Pill container = color/surface/card + 1px color/alpha/white-10 stroke INSIDE. Segments 72×44 fixed; active = color/brand/cta fill + color/alpha/white-100 text; inactive = transparent fill + color/alpha/white-50 text. Text style = Button/Sm (Sora SemiBold). Padding + gap bound to spacing/4. Labels 1/2/3/4 — designers customize per-instance.

ToggleSwitch.$comment: Track 34×20 pill, thumb 16×16 white circle. Off track = color/alpha/white-15 (new primitive); On track = color/brand/cta. Disabled = opacity 0.5 on variant frame. Pure visual atom, no component properties.

Input.$comment: Width 327 default (matches mobile content area). Per-variant helper text fill: Error → color/state/error, others → color/text/quaternary. HasHelper defaults to false — designers enable per use; Error variant inherits red helper styling when enabled. Atom #18 retrofit (2026-05-28): added RightIcon INSTANCE_SWAP (key RightIcon#109:0) with default Icon/Eye on all 4 State variants. Eye is the canonical password-reveal icon used most often in React (search-bar/clear and email/search inputs are forward-looking; designers swap per instance). Icon visibility still gated by HasRightIcon BOOLEAN (default false).

SearchBar.$comment: 327x52 pill container, color/surface/card + 1px stroke (white-10 default/filled, brand/cta focused) + Elevation/1. Two text nodes per variant: Placeholder (color/text/quaternary, visible Default+Focused) and Value (color/text/primary, visible Filled). HasClearButton BOOLEAN linked only to Filled variant's clearBtn.visible (default=true) — Default/Focused keep clearBtn.visible=false locally so switching variants doesn't drag the BOOLEAN with them. Atom #18 retrofit (2026-05-29): SearchIcon (INSTANCE_SWAP, key SearchIcon#113:0, default Icon/Search) and ClearIcon (INSTANCE_SWAP, key ClearIcon#113:4, default Icon/X) wired on all 3 variants — both icons are 16×16. The ClearIcon is wired on every variant (it lives inside Clear Button which is itself gated by HasClearButton visibility); the prop key just lets designers swap the X for e.g. a Trash or RotateCcw if context warrants.

LevelBadge.$comment: 15 variants in 5 Rarity × 3 Size grid at (80,1740). Pill (radius/pill), HUG width, fixed h per size: Sm=20 / Md=24 / Lg=28. Bg = solid bound to color/rarity/{name} with paint opacity 0.15 (alpha-tint mirroring DomainTag — zero new color tokens). Border = same rarity color at full opacity, 1px INSIDE. ◆ + 'Lv 1' text at full opacity in rarity color. Sora SemiBold override on top of size-appropriate text style (Sm=Small, Md=Caption, Lg=Body). Padding-x: Sm=spacing/6, Md=spacing/10 (new primitive, VariableID:62:2), Lg=spacing/12. Gap: Sm/Md=spacing/4, Lg=spacing/6. Elevation/1 shadow on every variant. Level TEXT prop default 'Lv 1' — single shared default works because all 15 variants have identical text content (DomainTag's per-variant text gotcha does NOT apply here). GOTCHA: setBoundVariableForPaint + spread+opacity pattern did NOT persist opacity 0.15 on first pass — required a follow-up read-modify-write pass (v.fills.map(p => ({...p, opacity:0.15}))). Cause unclear; prior atoms with same pattern (DomainTag) persisted correctly. For future alpha-tinted atoms, verify fill.opacity after creation and apply read-modify-write fix-up if needed.

Eyebrow.$comment: 2 variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (460, 1740). HUG/HUG auto-layout component wrapping a single Label text node. Eyebrow text style (S:04ba98…) linked — Sora SemiBold 12px UPPER 12% letter-spacing 130% line-height (all carried by the style; no override needed). Per-variant text fill: Default=color/text/quaternary (white/40, matches React code), Accent=color/brand/cta (forward-looking — code only has the Default styling). Text TEXT prop default 'EYEBROW' (single shared default OK — both variants have identical text content). GOTCHA: setting fontName AFTER setTextStyleIdAsync — even to the EXACT same fontName the style already uses — breaks the textStyleId link (left as ''). Required a follow-up setTextStyleIdAsync fix-up pass. For future atoms whose text style already provides the desired weight, SKIP the fontName-override step entirely.

BrandSymbol.$comment: 4 variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (1400, 2080). Square N×N container per variant: Sm=32, Md=48 (code default), Lg=64, Xl=96. Each variant has 2 children: GlowBackground frame (full-size, radius/lg bound on all 4 corners, fill bound to color/brand/orange with paint opacity 0.15, Glow/Orange effect style) + LogoMark VECTOR imported via figma.createNodeFromSvg from balencia-screens/public/logos/Logo Mark.svg (single-path SVG, viewBox 204×239). Vector preserves 204:239 aspect (taller-than-wide) at every size, centered horizontally, top-aligned vertically; fill bound to color/brand/cta. HasGlow BOOLEAN property at the set level (key 'HasGlow#76:0') links to each GlowBackground.visible (default false). When true, the orange-tinted bg + Glow/Orange shadow appear; otherwise the vector floats on transparent. GOTCHA: setBoundVariableForPaint + spread+opacity DID strip opacity on the 4-variant BrandSymbol build (same gotcha as LevelBadge's 15-variant build, NOT the same as Divider's 8-variant build where the alpha was intrinsic to the variable itself). Required a follow-up read-modify-write pass (v.bg.fills.map(p => ({...p, opacity:0.15}))) — bg opacity verified 0.15 post-fix. Set frame has ink-900 bg + radius 24 for documentation visibility (doesn't propagate to instances).

Divider.$comment: 8 variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (80, 2080). Generic divider primitive (path-a resolution): Orientation × Weight axes. Weight is intrinsic geometry — Thin=1px, Base=2px, Bold=3px, Poster=4px — NOT token-bound (per Phase 3A convention). Single fill bound to color/alpha/white-10 (VariableID:4:43); the alpha is intrinsic to the variable definition, so binding resolved opacity:0.1 correctly with NO fix-up pass needed (unlike LevelBadge's rarity/15 alpha-tints where the variable is base-color and opacity must be applied via paint-level multiplier). Set frame has bg fill bound to color/neutral/ink-900 + radius 24 purely for documentation visibility on Figma's light canvas — does NOT propagate to instances. The labeled 'Or continue with' separator in src/components/design-system/Divider.tsx is the single current usage; it should become a LabeledDivider molecule in Phase 3B composing Divider + caption text. Horizontal default length 240px, Vertical default length 240px — these are intrinsic, not bound; consumers in instances either hug (default) or fill via auto-layout parent.

FAB.$comment: 4 variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (816, 2620), 2×2 grid (cols=Variant, rows=State). Scope decision: Phase 3A covers only the canonical 56×56 round icon FAB — the React component's `display='pill'` form (h=48 text+icon-side-by-side) defers to Phase 3B as a FABExtendedPill molecule, since it's structurally a labeled button, not a primitive. State-axis Pressed cue (React active:scale-[0.93] is a transient gesture — not statically modelable): Primary Pressed swaps Elevation/2 for Glow/Orange effect style (brand-glow reinforces brand bg); Ghost Pressed gets opacity 0.85 on the variant frame (subtle dim — Ghost lacks a brand tint to glow from). Container: 56×56, all 4 corners bound to radius/pill (var 9:8). Bg fills: Primary=color/brand/cta (5:13), Ghost=color/surface/card (5:4). Ghost stroke: 1px INSIDE color/alpha/white-06 (4:44). Default Elevation/2 shadow style. Atom #18 retrofit (2026-05-29): Icon INSTANCE_SWAP (key Icon#115:0) wired on all 4 variants with default Icon/Plus at 24×24. Slot frame's white-40 placeholder fill + 4px radius CLEARED post-retrofit — left intact would have shown a faint box behind the icon (the slot was originally a marker, not a chrome element). Same cleanup applied to SearchBar's 'Icon / Search' + 'Icon / X' slots. Mints zero new tokens.

BrandWordmark.$comment: 3 variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (80, 2620). 4:1 aspect ratio matches code default (width=128, height=32). Each variant contains a single SVG wrapper FRAME imported via figma.createNodeFromSvg from balencia-screens/public/logos/Frame 2147239943.svg — 10-path multi-vector SVG (viewBox 200x50). After import, wrapper rescaled uniformly via wordmark.rescale(targetW/200) to match variant size: Sm=0.48x, Md=0.64x, Lg=0.96x. Per-vector fill binding: 2 orange paths (#FF6704 — the flame glyph + the trailing period dot) bound to color/brand/cta; 8 white paths (B-a-l-e-n-c-i-a letter shapes) bound to color/text/primary. No component properties — pure visual atom. Set frame has bg fill bound to color/neutral/ink-900 + cornerRadius 24 for documentation visibility on Figma's light canvas — does NOT propagate to instances. CONVENTION: createNodeFromSvg + rescale() works cleanly for multi-color multi-path SVGs; binding fills per child VECTOR avoids hardcoded hex while preserving the multi-fill structure. ⚠ ASSET DEPENDENCY: this is the official Balencia wordmark — DO NOT regenerate via AI or approximate; always use Frame 2147239943.svg as the canonical source. Unblocks 03-welcome-sign-up, 04-sign-in, splash, and any header that surfaces the full brand name.

ContinuousStroke.$comment: 4 variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (80, 2900) — single horizontal row. Single-path SVG (viewBox 0 0 128 48, path 'M4 22C20 6 42 6 54 21C66 36 86 42 124 12') imported via figma.createNodeFromSvg; VECTOR child extracted via findOne(n=>n.type==='VECTOR') and reparented to the 128×48 COMPONENT root. STROKE-ONLY: v.fills cleared, v.strokes bound to color/brand/cta. strokeWeight is intrinsic geometry per Phase 3A convention — NOT token-bound: Thin=2, Base=4 (matches React code default), Bold=6, Poster=8. strokeCap='ROUND', strokeJoin='ROUND' match React's strokeLinecap/Linejoin='round'. Component root has fills=[] (transparent canvas) + clipsContent=false so heavier weights are not cropped by the 128×48 viewBox frame. React's animated=true mode (CSS strokeDasharray animation) is runtime-only — not statically modeled. CONVENTION: single-path SVG stroke-only — bind v.strokes (not v.fills) since SVG path has fill='none'; setBoundVariableForPaint resolved cleanly on first pass (NO opacity fix-up needed since color/brand/cta is full-opacity). Zero new tokens. Set frame bg ink-900 + radius 24 for documentation visibility (does NOT propagate to instances).

MissionTypeBadge.$comment: 6 Type variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (760, 2900) in 3×2 grid (Row 1: Life/Main/Side = gold/silver/bronze; Row 2: Weekly/Daily/Group = steel/sage/copper). Pill (radius/pill all 4 corners), HUG width per label (41-61px), h=24 FIXED intrinsic. Auto-layout HORIZONTAL, padding-x = spacing/10 (matches React px-2.5), padding-y = 0, gap = 0. Border 1px INSIDE, color = matching mission color at 35% paint opacity. Bg fill = matching mission color at 20% paint opacity. Text = matching mission color at 100% opacity, Small style + Sora SemiBold 11px override (matches React text-small font-semibold). ⚠ PAINT-MULTIPLIER ALPHA GOTCHA: setBoundVariableForPaint + spread+opacity did NOT persist on first pass — both fill.opacity and stroke.opacity read 1 instead of 0.20/0.35. Applied LevelBadge precedent read-modify-write fix-up (v.fills.map(p => ({...p, opacity: 0.20})), strokes similar at 0.35). After fix-up, opacities verified 0.2 / 0.35. ⚠ HUG WIDTH GOTCHA: initial resize(60, 24) reverted primaryAxisSizingMode from AUTO to FIXED, locking all variants at 60px wide. Fix-up: re-applied primaryAxisSizingMode='AUTO' post-resize so each variant HUGs its label. Lesson: for HUG-on-content components, set primaryAxisSizingMode='AUTO' AFTER resize() AND after children are appended, not before. ⚠ TEXT STYLE LINK: per Eyebrow precedent, text.fontName=Sora SemiBold AFTER setTextStyleIdAsync(Small) breaks the textStyleId link to ''. Re-applied setTextStyleIdAsync(Small) as fix-up to restore the link. Per-variant labels (Life/Main/Side/Weekly/Daily/Group) baked in locally — NO Label TEXT property (DomainTag precedent — per-variant text differs, Figma's TEXT prop clobbers all variants with the shared default). Designers pick the variant to get the right label. Set frame bg ink-900 + radius 24 for documentation visibility (does NOT propagate to instances). Zero new tokens minted.

SocialAuthButton.$comment: 2 Provider variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (440, 3100), vertically stacked (387×188 total). Each variant is a 327×52 FIXED auto-layout HORIZONTAL container with radius/lg, padding-x spacing/12, gap spacing/8, bg color/surface/card, border 1px INSIDE color/alpha/white-10 (alpha INTRINSIC to variable — Divider precedent, no fix-up). Per-variant icon strategy: Google variant keeps its baked-in 4-vector SVG (88:3, the multicolor Google G in raw brand RGB — NOT token-bound, brand-mandate). Apple variant has a 20×20 Icon slot frame (88:10). Atom #18 retrofit (2026-05-29): added ProviderIcon INSTANCE_SWAP at SET level (key ProviderIcon#119:0, default Icon/Apple = 92:10), with componentPropertyReferences linked ONLY on the Apple variant's new instance (119:18). Apple slot's white-40 placeholder fill cleared. Google variant's 4 VECTORs verified intact post-retrofit (the retrofit per-variant linkage pattern works: SET-level prop visible to all instances, but the swap only fires on variants whose icon-instance has the propRef wired). Per-variant labels DIFFER ('Continue with Google' / 'Continue with Apple') — NO Label TEXT property (DomainTag precedent — when per-variant text differs, SKIP the TEXT prop). Text style = Button/Md (Sora SemiBold 16px) — natively SemiBold, NO fontName override needed. Text fill = color/text/primary. Set frame bg = color/neutral/ink-900 + cornerRadius 24 for documentation visibility. Zero new tokens minted. This atom unblocks 03-welcome-sign-up and 04-sign-in screen rebuilds in Phase 4.

SuggestionChip.$comment: 2 State variants on Atoms page (17:11) at (80, 3100). HUG width 102 × FIXED h=36 pill (radius/pill all 4 corners). Padding-x = spacing/12 (12), gap = spacing/4 (4). Bg = solid color/surface/card at full opacity. Border = 1px INSIDE color/brand/royal-purple at 35% paint-multiplier opacity. Text = color/brand/royal-purple full opacity. Text style = Button/Sm (Sora SemiBold 13px, 140% line-height) — chose Button/Sm over Body to natively carry SemiBold weight without fontName override, sidestepping the textStyleId-link gotcha (Eyebrow/MissionTypeBadge precedent). React code is 14px / 18px line-height — Button/Sm at 13px / ~18px is within visual tolerance and avoids any post-style fontName override. Scope decision per AskUserQuestion: option (a) State-only axis — no Domain variant axis. Per-domain styling (12 colors via domainToneClasses[domain]) is applied per-instance via manual border/text color edits. Pressed cue per AskUserQuestion: option (a) opacity 0.85 on the variant frame (FAB Ghost-Pressed precedent — card surface lacks a brand tint to glow from, so subtle dim is the cleanest static cue). Label TEXT prop default 'Suggestion' — single shared default works because both variants have identical text content (LevelBadge precedent, NOT DomainTag precedent — text is identical across variants). ⚠ PAINT-MULTIPLIER ALPHA GOTCHA: setBoundVariableForPaint + spread+opacity did NOT persist stroke opacity on first pass (variable is solid color, alpha applied as paint multiplier). Applied read-modify-write fix-up (v.comp.strokes.map(p => ({...p, opacity: 0.35}))). Post-fix verified 0.35. ⚠ HUG WIDTH GOTCHA: resize(140, 36) reverted primaryAxisSizingMode from AUTO to FIXED; re-applied AUTO post-resize so each variant HUGs to its label width (102px). MissionTypeBadge precedent. Bg fill (color/surface/card at full opacity) needed no fix-up — full opacity isn't subject to the paint-multiplier gotcha. Set frame bg = color/neutral/ink-900 + cornerRadius 24 for documentation visibility (does NOT propagate to instances). Zero new tokens minted. This atom unblocks any chat/conversation suggestion-row composition (SiaConversation, SiaChatTopBar quick-prompts).

DomainTag.$comment: 12 Domain variants in 4×3 grid (HUG width 56-106, h=24, radius/sm, padding-x spacing/8, gap spacing/6). Bg fill = solid bound to color/domain/{name} with paint opacity 0.15 (zero new color tokens — paint opacity multiplies the bound RGB). Dot (6×6 pill) + Label (Small text style + Sora SemiBold override, 11px) both at full opacity in the same domain color. Per-variant labels (Fitness/Sleep/…) are baked in locally — NO Label TEXT property because Figma's linked TEXT prop overrides per-variant characters with the shared prop default (incompatible with per-variant defaults). Designers pick the variant to get the right label; customization requires detach. Mints spacing/6 = 6px (new primitive, WIDTH_HEIGHT+GAP scopes, WEB syntax `6px`).

Card.$comment: First Phase 3B molecule. 3 Variants on Molecules page (17:12) at (80,80) in a horizontal row (set 1141w × 194h with 40px padding + 40px itemSpacing). Code/Figma mismatch resolved path (a): figma-components-map declared Variant×Padding (3×3=9) but React Card couples radius+padding per variant (default rounded-xl p-6 / small rounded-md p-4 / hero rounded-2xl p-8). User chose 'Match React code exactly' → 3 variants only, radius+padding coupled per variant, React's 'small' renamed to 'Compact' for DS naming consistency, 'hero' renamed to 'Hero'. Common chrome: bg = color/surface/card (full opacity, no fix-up needed), 1px INSIDE border = color/alpha/white-06 (alpha intrinsic to variable — Divider precedent, no read-modify-write fix-up), Elevation/1 effect style, width FIXED 327 (mobile content width), height HUG. Per-variant: Default = radius/xl (28pt) + spacing/24 padding, Compact = radius/md (14pt) + spacing/16, Hero = radius/2xl (40pt) + spacing/32. Itemspacing bound to spacing/8 (gap between title + subtitle). Two placeholder text children per variant: Title 'Card content' (Body style, color/text/primary) + Subtitle 'Replace with your content' (Caption style, color/text/tertiary), both FILL horizontal + text-align center. No component properties (Card is a pure container — children come from instance overrides). GOTCHA: figma.createAutoLayout returns a FRAME — combineAsVariants throws 'A COMPONENT_SET node cannot have children of type other than COMPONENT' when fed frames. Fix: build each variant as a COMPONENT via figma.createComponent(), then set layoutMode='VERTICAL' + sizing modes manually. Helper mkAutoComp(direction) wraps this pattern for future molecules. Zero new tokens minted.

SectionHeader.$comment: 2nd Phase 3B molecule. 2 WithAction variants on Molecules page (17:12) at (80, 380), horizontal row (set 774×98 with 40px padding + 40px itemSpacing, ink-900 bg + radius 24 for documentation visibility on Figma's light canvas — does NOT propagate to instances). Each variant is a 327 FIXED-wide × HUG-height HORIZONTAL auto-layout with primaryAxisAlignItems='SPACE_BETWEEN' + counterAxisAlignItems='CENTER'. Title text node: Eyebrow text style (Sora SemiBold 12px upper) + color/text/quaternary fill (matches Eyebrow atom Default variant). On True variant only, Action group = horizontal auto-layout with itemSpacing bound to spacing/4, containing: ActionLabel text (Button/Sm style = Sora SemiBold 13px + color/text/secondary fill) + ChevronRight icon instance (from 93:75) resized to 16×16 inheriting color/text/primary strokes from the Icon component. Title TEXT prop (key Title#125:0, default 'SECTION TITLE') linked to title.componentPropertyReferences.characters on BOTH variants (LevelBadge precedent — shared default works because both variants have identical default text). ActionLabel TEXT prop (key ActionLabel#125:3, default 'View all') linked to actionLabel.componentPropertyReferences.characters on the True variant only (no clobbering — only one variant has the text node). Title text uses Sora SemiBold via Eyebrow style natively (no fontName override needed — Eyebrow precedent). Action label uses Button/Sm SemiBold natively (no override). Composition pattern: SectionHeader does NOT instance the Eyebrow atom — instead uses a raw text node with the Eyebrow text style. Reason: linking a molecule-level TEXT prop to a nested instance's TEXT prop requires exposed-instance-property wiring, more complex than a flat text node when the atom is visually equivalent to 'styled text'. This is a deliberate composition trade-off for text-only atoms; for structural atoms (Button, ToggleSwitch, etc.) molecules WILL instance the atom directly. Zero new tokens minted.

SettingsRow.$comment: 3rd Phase 3B molecule. 4 Trailing variants on Molecules page (17:12) at (80, 560), horizontal row (set 1508×132 with ink-900 bg + radius 24 documentation chrome). Each variant: 327 FIXED-wide × 52 FIXED-height HORIZONTAL auto-layout, bg color/surface/card, padding-x spacing/16, padding-y spacing/12, itemSpacing bound to spacing/12, counterAxisAlignItems='CENTER', primaryAxisAlignItems='MIN'. Scope decisions per AskUserQuestion: (a) Destructive variant SKIPPED — match Figma plan exactly, treat as per-instance manual override or future SettingsRowDestructive molecule. (b) Optional left icon ENABLED via HasIcon BOOLEAN + Icon INSTANCE_SWAP (Phase 3A Button/Input/Chip precedent). Children per variant: (1) IconGroup = 32×32 FRAME with color/alpha/white-06 fill + radius/pill on all 4 corners, holding a 16×16 Icon/Settings instance centered. iconGroup.visible defaults to false; gated by HasIcon BOOLEAN (key HasIcon#128:10) wired via iconGroup.componentPropertyReferences = { visible: hasIconKey } on all 4 variants. Icon INSTANCE_SWAP (key Icon#128:15, default Icon/Settings = 98:43) wired via iconInst.componentPropertyReferences = { mainComponent: iconPropKey } on all 4 variants. INSTANCE_SWAP defaultValue uses local node ID (98:43), NOT key — Phase 3A retrofit precedent. preferredValues uses { type: 'COMPONENT', key: <key> }. (2) Label TEXT (Body style + color/text/primary) FILL horizontal, Title TEXT prop (Title#128:0, default 'Setting label') linked on all 4 variants — LevelBadge precedent (shared default OK since all 4 variants default to the same label). (3) Trailing per variant: Chevron = ChevronRight icon instance (from 93:75) at 16×16; Toggle = ToggleSwitch atom instance (48:2 = On=False/Disabled=False — default state); Value = right-aligned Body text 'Value' (color/text/tertiary) with Value TEXT prop (Value#128:5) linked on the Value variant only (no clobbering); None = no trailing element. COMPOSITION CONVENTION REINFORCED: structural atoms (ToggleSwitch, Icon) are instanced directly, NOT rebuilt — Phase 3A precedent applied to molecules. NEW GOTCHA — figma.createComponent returns a COMPONENT which cannot have COMPONENT children — first attempt built iconGroup via mkAutoComp helper (creates COMPONENT) and appendChild threw 'Reparenting would create a component inside a component'. Fix: use figma.createAutoLayout for inner FRAMEs and reserve mkAutoComp for the variant wrappers only. Added mkAutoFrame helper (createAutoLayout + clear default white fill) for inner-block reuse. React divergence intentionally minimal: bottom border (border-b border-white/[0.05]) deliberately SKIPPED — it's a screen-composition concern (SettingsGroup wraps rows with overflow-hidden + rounded-xl, the divider lives between rows inside the group; an in-molecule border would render orphaned borders in single-row use). Designers add borders manually if needed via Figma's stroke per-side. Zero new tokens minted.

ProgressRing.$comment: 4th Phase 3B molecule (B1 batch). 6 variants = Size(Sm=36/Md=48/Lg=96) × Color(Brand/Success). Color axis = React's two states (Brand=in-progress orange color/brand/cta, Success=complete green color/brand/success — code derives complete=progress>=1). Inventory's 3rd 'Domain' color DROPPED (no domain-colored ring in code; 'Domain' is not one token). Rings rendered as two concentric ELLIPSE donut-arcs via arcData (not SVG strokes): outer Ø=2*(r+stroke/2)=34/44/92 centered in the size box; innerRadius=(r-stroke/2)/(r+stroke/2)=0.765/0.818/0.826 sets band width. Track = full 0→2π sweep bound to color/alpha/white-10 (alpha intrinsic, no fix-up). Progress arc baked at 75% (start -π/2 top, clockwise — Figma angles increase clockwise from east), bound to color/brand/{cta|success} full opacity. Arc % can't be a Figma prop → static snapshot; rounded linecap not modeled (flat radial ends). Percent text = explicit Sora SemiBold 11/13/20px, NO style link (ramp has no SemiBold at these sizes — component-intrinsic type), fill color/text/primary. Percent TEXT prop (Percent#138:0, default '75') linked to all 6 variants (LevelBadge precedent). Components are plain absolute-canvas COMPONENTs (no auto-layout) — combineAsVariants accepts them. Zero new tokens minted.

XPBar.$comment: 5th Phase 3B molecule (B1 batch). Default = label row (Label left + Amount right, SPACE_BETWEEN) over the track; Compact = track only (React renders label row conditionally). Both 327 FIXED-wide VERTICAL auto-layout, itemSpacing bound spacing/8. Track = plain FRAME 327×8 (clipsContent), bg bound color/alpha/white-08 (NEW primitive VariableID:140:2 minted this build), all corners radius/pill; inner Fill baked 70% width bound color/brand/cta + radius/pill (progress % is a static snapshot). Track height 8px intrinsic geometry (not token-bound). Label/Amount = explicit Sora SemiBold 11px, fill color/alpha/white-50, NO style link (component-intrinsic type). Label TEXT prop (Label#142:0) + Amount TEXT prop (Amount#142:3) linked on Default ONLY. Minted color/alpha/white-08.

iPhone device frame.rationale: Pixel-perfect Apple-official iPhone chrome with dynamic island + home indicator. Rebuilding would duplicate Apple's geometry imperfectly.

SF Symbols.rationale: Balencia uses Lucide icons in code, not SF Symbols. Build our own Icon component referencing Lucide; do not import SF Symbols.

Material/Simple DS components.rationale: Balencia has its own visual language — warm ink + burnt orange — not Material. The component API does not match. Build from scratch in Balencia DS.
